hero.subtitle: The best Mexican food in Colorado. Enjoy our legendary Green Chile and traditional recipes that will make you feel at home.

about.title: A family legacy cooked with heart and passion.
about.p1: Las Potrancas was born from a conversation between my wife and I when our daughter was just 3 months old. I asked myself what future I could build for my children and understood that being an employee was not enough.
about.p2: As a chef I decided to take the next step and open my own restaurant. Today, Las Potrancas is the result of that courageous decision: a business with heart, passion for cooking, and a vision to leave a family legacy.

specials.title: Daily Specials
specials.desc: Monday to Friday until 3 PM. The best choice for your lunch.

green_chile.title: The Best Green Chile
green_chile.desc: Our green chile is recognized as one of the best in all of Colorado.

about.testimonial: My family loves this place. The margaritas are fresh and delicious, and all the food is fantastic!

p1.title: Traditional Dishes
p1.desc: Tacos, enchiladas, tamales, pozole, and mole. Recipes that have been passed down through generations.

p2.title: Premium Green Chile
p2.desc: Our star specialty. An authentic and spicy flavor that defines our identity.

p3.title: Drinks and Cocktails
p3.desc: Handcrafted margaritas, micheladas, and traditional drinks to accompany your meal.

p4.title: Catering Packages
p4.desc: We bring the flavor of Las Potrancas to your private parties, businesses, and family celebrations.

cta_box.title: Ready to taste the real flavor?
cta_box.desc: Book your table now and enjoy the best Mexican food in a cozy setting. We look forward to seeing you!

q1.a: Yes! You can reserve your table by calling us directly or sending us a message via WhatsApp. We recommend booking for large groups or weekends.

q2.a: Absolutely. We offer full catering for private events, weddings, family parties, and corporate events throughout the Arvada area and surroundings.

q3.a: Yes, you can place your order by phone and pick it up. Enjoy the flavor of Las Potrancas in the comfort of your home.

q4.a: We have several dishes that can be adapted to vegetarian diets, always maintaining the traditional Mexican flavor.

q5.a: Yes, we have special packages for office lunches and corporate meetings. Contact us for more details.

contact.title: Visit us or
contact.p: We are ready to serve you the best Mexican food in Colorado. Whether it's for a family dinner or a special event, we are here for you.

footer.desc: Authentic Mexican food in Colorado. A family legacy built with passion, traditional seasoning, and the best green chile in the region.
footer.follow_desc: Stay up to date with our promotions and new dishes.
